channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: Windows 11 Why do my Bluetooth headphones keep cutting out randomly?
item.description: My Bluetooth headphones work fine on my phone, but on Windows 11, the audio keeps cutting out every few minutes. I’ve tried updating drivers, but it still happens. Any fixes?
item.dc:creator: Stonehu

item.title: Windows 11 What is a virtual hard disk, and does it add real storage?
item.description: I saw the virtual hard disk option on my Windows 11 laptop. My device only has 512GB, but this lets me set a huge "storage" size. Can I use it to store files? Does it actually give me more space, and what's it for?
item.dc:creator: OakleyCruz

item.title: Windows 11 WiFi keeps disconnecting randomly
item.description: My WiFi works fine on other devices but on Windows 11 it disconnects out of nowhere every few minutes. I have to reconnect manually every time. Super annoying when working or watching videos.
item.dc:creator: Mikaeliop

item.title: Windows 11 right menu is too slow and laggy
item.description: Right clicking on files or desktop takes forever to show the menu. It’s way slower than Windows 10. Is there a way to make it faster or go back to the old right-click menu?
item.dc:creator: AAbner

item.title: A demonstration of Virtual Network TAP
item.description: Azure Virtual Network Terminal Access Point (VTAP), at the time of writing in April 2026 in public preview in select regions, copies network traffic from source Virtual Machines to a collector or traffic analytics tool, running as a Network Virtual Appliance (NVA). VTAP creates a full copy of all...
item.dc:creator: Marc de Droog

item.title: Creating a Planner Weekly Notification Email for Incomplete Tasks
item.description: A reader wanted a weekly incomplete task report to send details of Planner tasks to people with outstanding work to do. We used PowerShell to scan for incomplete tasks for people who are members of a group, perform some analysis on the data, and create and send email. Despite some deficiencies in...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: How to unlock iPhone when is disabled and connect to itunes?
item.description: My iPhone is disabled after several incorrect passcode attempts, and now it cannot be accessed at all. The screen shows a message:iPhone is disabled. Connect to iTunesNow, this iPhone is unavailable, and there doesn't seem to be a way to enter the passcode again. What is the safest and easiest way...
item.dc:creator: AndrewHall

item.title: Unable to control iphone from mac via iphone mirroring app
item.description: Hi everyone,A connection issue appears when trying to use the iPhone mirroring feature on a Mac. The device does not show up, or the connection fails without a clear message. Both devices seem to be on the same network, but the feature still does not work as expected.How can I control iphone from...
item.dc:creator: HunterBell

item.title: ¿Cuál es el mejor software NTFS para Mac M5?
item.description: Hola,Tengo problemas para escribir en una unidad NTFS en mi Mac M5. He probado algunas soluciones, pero ninguna ha funcionado correctamente. He leído que existen programas especializados para habilitar la escritura en unidades NTFS en macOS Tahoe, pero no estoy seguro de cuál es el mejor. ¿Cuáles...
item.dc:creator: JasperMonroe

item.title: Choosing the Right Azure Hosting Option for Your AI Agents
item.description: A comprehensive guide to hosting AI agents on Azure, with a deep dive into Microsoft Foundry Hosted Agents As AI agents become the backbone of intelligent applications, developers face a critical decision: where and how to host these agents at scale. Azure provides multiple hosting options, each...
item.dc:creator: Reenu Saluja

item.title: Supercharge Your Dev Workflows with GitHub Copilot Custom Skills
item.description: The Problem Every team has those repetitive, multi-step workflows that eat up time: Running a sequence of CLI commands, parsing output, and generating a report Querying multiple APIs, correlating data, and summarizing findings Executing test suites, analyzing failures, and producing actionable...
item.dc:creator: sachoudhury

item.title: DevOps Playbook for the Agentic Era
item.description: Practices, Principles, and Strategic Direction Software delivery has entered a new phase. AI agents are no longer confined to autocomplete suggestions in the editor. They are opening pull requests, generating code across multiple files, proposing infrastructure changes, responding to issues with...
item.dc:creator: David Sanchez

item.title: Data Security Posture Reports (Custom Workspace and Charts)
item.description: For more insights on OOB Reports, check out this article. Overview: NOW IN PUBLIC PREVIEW Microsoft Purview Posture Reports provide a clear, outcome‑based view of how effectively data protection controls, such as Sensitivity Labels and Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies, are working across...
item.dc:creator: Sarahzin_Shane

item.title: Building a Scalable IoT Platform for Facility Management with Azure Serverless Services
item.description: The platform follows a microservices architecture with six independently deployable services, all built on Azure Functions v4 with TypeScript. Each service is containerized and deployed to Azure Container Apps. ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │...
item.dc:creator: nishantmv

item.title: OIDC support for Dependabot and code scanning
item.description: Dependabot and code scanning now support OpenID Connect (OIDC) authentication for private registries configured at the organization level, eliminating the need to store long-lived credentials as repository secrets. What’s new… The post OIDC support for Dependabot and code scanning appeared first on...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Deployment context in repository properties and alerts
item.description: Artifact and deployment context now appears in two new places: repository properties and security alert pages. Repository properties: deployable and deployed Two new built-in repository properties—deployable and deployed—are now available.… The post Deployment context in repository properties and...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Announcing Public Preview: Security Copilot’s Email Summary in Microsoft Defender
item.description: Co-Authors: Cristina Da Gama Henriquez and Ajaj Shaikh AI is rapidly reshaping both sides of the security landscape, and email remains one of the most common and complex entry points for attacks. As adversaries use AI to scale more sophisticated phishing and email-based threats, defenders are under...
item.dc:creator: cristinadagamah

item.title: Data Security Posture Reports
item.description: Proving Your Data Security Posture with Confidence Microsoft Purview Posture Reports help organizations prove (not just assume) that their data security controls are working. They provide a clear, outcome‑based view of how effectively sensitivity labels and Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policies are...
item.dc:creator: Sarahzin_Shane

item.title: .NET and .NET Framework April 2026 servicing releases updates
item.description: A recap of the latest servicing updates for .NET and .NET Framework for April 2026. The post .NET and .NET Framework April 2026 servicing releases updates appeared first on .NET Blog.
item.dc:creator: Rahul Bhandari (MSFT), Tara Overfield

item.title: .NET 11 Preview 3 is now available!
item.description: Find out about the new features in .NET 11 Preview 3 across the .NET runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, .NET MAUI, C#, Entity Framework Core, container images, and more! The post .NET 11 Preview 3 is now available! appeared first on .NET Blog.
item.dc:creator: .NET Team

item.title: Stop juggling package managers—just run `azd update`
item.description: Update the Azure Developer CLI with a single command on any platform and switch release channels. The post Stop juggling package managers—just run `azd update` appeared first on Azure SDK Blog.
item.dc:creator: Kristen Womack

item.title: April Patches for Azure DevOps Server
item.description: We are releasing patches for our self‑hosted product, Azure DevOps Server. We strongly recommend that all customers remain on the latest, most secure version to ensure optimal protection and reliability. The latest release of Azure DevOps Server is available from the download page. This patch...
item.dc:creator: Gloridel Morales

item.title: Link code scanning alerts to GitHub Issues
item.description: You can now link code scanning alerts to GitHub Issues, bringing security remediation into your existing planning and tracking workflows. This functionality is in public preview. With this update, you… The post Link code scanning alerts to GitHub Issues appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Hack the AI agent: Build agentic AI security skills with the GitHub Secure Code Game
item.description: Learn to find and exploit real-world agentic AI vulnerabilities through five progressive challenges in this free, open source game that over 10,000 developers have already used to sharpen their security skills. The post Hack the AI agent: Build agentic AI security skills with the GitHub Secure Code...
item.dc:creator: Joseph Katsioloudes

item.title: Azure Arc Server Mar 2026 Forum Recap
item.description: Please find the recording for the monthly Azure Arc Server Forum on YouTube! During the March 2026 Azure Arc Server Forum, we discussed: Deploying Ansible Playbooks through Machine Configuration as Azure Policy (Learn more: Announcing Private Preview: Deploy Ansible Playbooks using Azure Policy via...
item.dc:creator: Aurnov_Chattopadhyay

item.title: Demystifying On-Demand Capacity Reservations
item.description: About On-Demand Capacity Reservations Introducing the “parking garage” metaphor There are dozens of VM types available in Azure which span multiple generations of CPU across vendors and architectures. Within each Azure region are datacenters hosting pools of hardware which runs Azure services, such...
item.dc:creator: KenHooverMSFT

item.title: Secret scanning pattern updates and product improvements
item.description: This week, we’re rolling out several improvements to our detection coverage, APIs, and workflows. These improvements strengthen our continued investment in the developer experience of our secret scanning features. Built… The post Secret scanning pattern updates and product improvements appeared...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Running KQL queries on Microsoft Sentinel data lake using API
item.description: Co-Authors: Zeinab Mokhtarian Koorabbasloo and Matthew Lowe As security data lakes become the backbone of modern analytics platforms, organizations need new ways to operationalize their data. While interactive tools and portals support data exploration, many real-world workflows increasingly...
item.dc:creator: Zeinab Mokhtarian Koorabbasloo

item.title: Qurious About Quantum?
item.description: Why IT Should Care About Quantum Right Now – It’s Not Just A Research Problem Today on April 14th, 2026 we celebrate World Quantum Day! There has been a noticeable rise in the topic of quantum computing appearing across technical conferences, business news, and strategic planning conversations. But...
item.dc:creator: JohnGruszczyk

item.title: Your Oracle Data Is Sitting Next to Microsoft AI. Are You Using It?
item.description: "Your organization runs Oracle on Azure. You've purchased Microsoft Foundry & OpenAI licenses. Why are your AI projects still stuck in proof-of-concept? "Your employees spend hours every week entering or reconciling data from documents, copying information into ERP systems. What would it mean if...
item.dc:creator: ManishChopra

item.title: Take your PostgreSQL-backed apps to the next level
item.description: PostgreSQL is a powerful and hugely popular database engine, and it really comes alive across Microsoft developer platforms. You can build with PostgreSQL across Azure offerings, develop productively in Visual Studio Code with strong extensions and tooling, and connect your data to agentic...
item.dc:creator: Ismael Mejía Useche

item.title: New Aspire database integrations
item.description: Aspire 13.2 brings MongoDB Entity Framework Core and Azure Data Lake Storage integrations, plus quality-of-life improvements to existing database clients. The post New Aspire database integrations appeared first on Aspire Blog.
item.dc:creator: Alistair Matthews

item.title: No Exchange Server Security Updates for April 2026
item.description: Although Exchange 2016 and 2019 are now out of support, some customers have purchased the Exchange 2016 and 2019 Extended Security Update (ESU). We have therefore decided that until the end of this Exchange 2016 and 2019 ESU period (April 2026) we will make an explicit update related announcement...
item.dc:creator: The_Exchange_Team

item.title: Build Multi-Agent AI Apps on Azure App Service with Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0
item.description: Part 1 of 3 — Multi-Agent AI on Azure App Service This is part 1 of a 3 part series on deploying and working with multi-agent AI on Azure App Service. Follow allong to learn how to deploy, manage, observe, and secure your agents on Azure App Service. A couple of months ago, we published a...
item.dc:creator: jordanselig

item.title: Monitor AI Agents on App Service with OpenTelemetry and the New Application Insights Agents View
item.description: Part 2 of 3: In Blog 1, we deployed a multi-agent travel planner on Azure App Service using the Microsoft Agent Framework (MAF) 1.0 GA. This post dives deep into how we instrumented those agents with OpenTelemetry and lit up the brand-new Agents (Preview) view in Application Insights. 📋...
item.dc:creator: jordanselig

item.title: Microsoft Sentinel data federation: Expand visibility while preserving governance
item.description: Security data volumes are growing faster than ever, but visibility across the entire digital estate hasn’t kept pace. As organizations expand across cloud, hybrid, and SaaS environments, critical security-relevant data is increasingly stored across multiple data stores due to governance and...
item.dc:creator: chaitra_satish

item.title: SBOM exports are now computed asynchronously
item.description: Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) exports from repository pages and new API endpoints are now asynchronous operations. Previously, navigating to a repository’s dependency graph page and clicking the Export SBOM… The post SBOM exports are now computed asynchronously appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Model selection for Claude and Codex agents on github.com
item.description: Model selection is now available for the Claude and Codex third-party coding agents on github.com. Just like Copilot cloud agent, you can now select a model when kicking off a… The post Model selection for Claude and Codex agents on github.com appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Inaccessible colour contrast for high text in Microsoft Teams in Dark mode on desktop
item.description: Issue:All highlighted text in Teams has poor colour contrast when in Dark mode on desktop. While some may be readable, none of the highlight colour options meet WCAG colour contrast minimums. How to reproduceGo to MS teams app on Win 11 and set appearance to dark mode.Create any default coloured...
item.dc:creator: jlimbath

item.title: How exposed is your code? Find out in minutes—for free
item.description: The new Code Security Risk Assessment gives you a one-click view of vulnerabilities across your organization, at no cost. The post How exposed is your code? Find out in minutes—for free appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Dorothy Pearce

item.title: error updating
item.description: my windows dont update, returns error 0xc1900130, i tried everything but without success windows 11 29531.1000 please help
item.dc:creator: andreluiz22

item.title: Teams & channels names are blank
item.description: So fun UI issue on Desktop application (26072.519.4556.7438).. Teams and channels are blank and not clickable.. I've reset & repaired app, cleared the cache and reinstalled (temp fixed but same issue came back) Web version works good, but user wants a fix not a "workaround"Any ideas?
item.dc:creator: TCEQJackie

item.title: Suggestion - add notable option to any item
item.description: any item like settings file folder can be add to notebook to keep history or work for later , or more info about the item
item.dc:creator: winsaart

item.title: attach file option not visible with bot joined call
item.description: I have created bot using azure and recall.ai When bot joins adhoc or schedule team meetings, it is appearing as an external user.While we have created bot email as well in azure AD. And I think due to this we are not able to see attach file option in teams chat when bot gets invited into the adhoc...
item.dc:creator: arpit_jain

item.title: Question about Teams Phone licensing
item.description: Hi everyone, I have a question about Teams Phone licensing:If I have some users who have Teams Phone to make and receive external calls, when one of them receives an external call, can they transfer it to another user who only has a regular Teams license but not a Teams Phone license? Or does the...
item.dc:creator: santi31105

item.title: One platform, many insights: How Eventhouse brings analytics together (Preview)
item.description: Modern analytics isn’t just about storing data. It’s about detecting issues early, understanding them fast, and acting with confidence. Eventhouse in Microsoft Fabric brings advanced analytics capabilities together so teams can move from raw events to insight and action without stitching tools or...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: GitHub Code Quality: Improvements to standard findings in public preview
item.description: We’ve updated the GitHub Code Quality experience to make it easier to navigate and triage findings across your repository. GitHub Code Quality standard findings help you detect potential reliability and… The post GitHub Code Quality: Improvements to standard findings in public preview appeared...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Windows 11 Insider Update GSOD (Green Screen), Can’t Install
item.description: Getting Green Screen of Death (GSOD) while updating to Canary Build 27858: KMODE_EXCEPTION_NOT_HANDLED. Crashes every time during download can’t install at all.
item.dc:creator: Stonehu

item.title: Windows 11 Dark Mode Incomplete, Old UI Still White
item.description: Full system dark mode is enabled, but old windows like File Properties, Control Panel, and progress popups stay bright white. Android/iOS have had full dark mode for years—why can’t Microsoft fix this?
item.dc:creator: JacobBrown

item.title: Windows 11 can’t eject USB drive, says it’s in use
item.description: Every time I try to eject my USB drive on Windows 11, it says the device is in use. I closed all windows but it still won’t work. I don’t want to pull it out directly. Any fix?
item.dc:creator: AnselRhodes
